title: Terramity
description: Terramity is a Terraria-inspired mod that adds many new bosses and weapons to diversify your Minecraft experience
body:
![About Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd4bed0702494686936aaaf6cba8ddce4ccc5a10.png)

Join the Discord! -> https://discord.gg/nvF9BsFep5

**v1.0 COMING SOON! A MASSIVE update that will rework Terramity from the ground up! 4+ new bosses along with reworked bosses, boss music, 100+ new weapons, a revamped gun system, 250+ new curios accessories, and SO MUCH more!**



_Early Look:_
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/t6gN5plxJhg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fSZOUE1eMok" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Terramity is a forge mod inspired by progression-heavy games like Terraria, and aims to solve the problem with the lack of things to do in Minecraft if you tend to get bored quickly.

Many new bosses, weapons, accessories (via the Curios mod), and structures to explore are added to diversify the playing experience. The mod comes a _**Patchouli** guidebook_ that serves as an in-game wiki and a way to know what to do next without googling all the time.

Terramity attempts to also explore the underutilized facets of vanilla, and touches on them to give them more purpose in your Minecraft playthrough, such as sniffers and bees. Multiplayer is a focus, and Terramity adds multiplayer boss health scaling, making the multiplayer experience more balanced and enjoyable.

![Stuff Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db35128cc8a91b51b3136a100cf71c6538056beb.png)

![Split Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc41cd37b908d8335996dff381fa0772f3f3e9f2.png)

This mod requires Curios, Patchouli, Geckolib, and Caelus API.



Please note that while the mod may be released, not everything is finished. There may still be some bugs that need ironed out. As of now, please DM me on discord (@aurukel) to report bugs. A discord server or github will likely be opened soon!



FAQ

-Will this mod be ported to fabric?

Nope, sorry.

-Will this mod be ported to later versions?

I'm not sure. If I have the time, I'll work on porting everything in the future but as it stands, 1.20.1 is still the most popular modding version and the version I'll be sticking to.

-Will this mod be ported to previous versions?

Nope, sorry.

-Can I use this mod in a modpack or in a video?

Sure. I'd appreciate if you were to let me know if you do, but it's not required.

-What's planned for future versions?

Right now, a couple bosses are planned and some features like being able to aim down sights with sniper rifles, and potentially boss music.
